ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO COMPEL TO PROVIDE RESPONSES TO SUPPLEMENTAL INTEROGGATORIES HEARING SET FOR JAN-18-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL TO PROVIDE RESPONSES TO SUPPLEMENTAL INTEROGGATORIES IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 18, 2013 TO GIVE DEFENDANTS THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANTS MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 11, 2013 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. =302/JPT

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. This dismissal pertains to the remaining cross complaint(s). JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 to place a settlement on the record.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Geraldin Armendariz, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Barrett Miller. Plaintiff Barrett Miller sworn and examined on his own behalf.
Kenneth D. Simoncini, Esq., and William H. Coke, Esq., appearing for Defendants Golden Gate Bridge Highway and Transportation District; David Gratol Ilumin, and Charles Leon Robinson, III.
Grace M. Hess Third Pary Claims Administrator for Golden Gate Bridge, Highway & Transportation District.
Kevin J. Hermanson, Esq., appearing for Cross-Defendant Barrett Lee Miller.
Case settled. Terms and conditions of settlement read into the record. Settlement amount is subject to approval by the Golden Gate Bridge, Highway & Transportation District's board.
Kenneth D. Simoncini to prepare written documents. Case scheduled for Dismissal Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on February 25, 2014 at 10:00 AM, in Department 610.

Mtn To Compel To Provide Responses To Supp Interoggs
Off Calendar Jan-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted.

DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY AND TRANSPORTATION'S Motion To Compel To Provide Responses To Supplemental Interoggatories is continued on the court's own motion to January 18, 2013 to give Defendants the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendants must deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 11, 2013 at 4 pm, or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. =302/JPT
